Who We Are

A Legacy of
Academic Excellence

Founded in 2010, Oriented Commerce Circle has transformed the commerce education landscape with a relentless commitment to quality teaching and student success. Our holistic approach combines rigorous academics with personal mentorship.

We don't just prepare students for exams — we build future CAs, CFOs, entrepreneurs, and finance professionals who go on to lead organisations across the nation.

View All Courses→
15+
Years of Academic Excellence
500+
Top
Rankers
What We Offer

Our Programmes

Industry-aligned courses designed for board examinations and professional certifications.

📊
Class XI — Commerce
Foundation-level coaching covering Accounts, Business Studies, Economics, and Maths with conceptual clarity.
1 Year CBSE / State
🏆
Class XII — Commerce
Intensive board-focused preparation with mock tests, revision sessions and personalised doubt clearing.
1 Year Board Exam Focus
📋
Accountancy
The systematic process of recording, classifying, and summarising a company's financial transactions.
10 Months CBSE / MP board
⚖️
IP (Informatics Practices)
An academic subject that equips students with practical skills in data management, programming, and database systems.
10 Months CBSE / MP board
📈
Business Studies
Business studies, often called business, is a field of study that deals with the principles of business, management, and economics.
10 Months CBSE / MP board
🎯
Economics
Social science that studies the production, distribution, and consumption of goods and services
10 Months CBSE / MP Board
